concept: Justice / The Gentle Path to Wholeness
description: The process of restoring balance and mending relationships within a community after a disharmony has occurred. It focuses on healing and reintegration rather than punishment.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'shi' (gentle focus), 'le' (gentle flow), and 'i' (essence, integrity). The word's structure means 'the gentle flow back to integrity.' This sonically and semantically embodies the tempered, restorative nature of justice in Phi.
